name: Queen Elizabeth-class Aircraft Carrier
description: The Royal Navy's largest warship, a 65,000-tonne STOVL carrier operating F-35B Lightning II jets. Features a twin-island design and ski-jump ramp for short takeoff operations.

specialAbilities.name: STOVL Air Wing
specialAbilities.description: Operates up to 36 F-35B jets using ski-jump launch, enabling carrier aviation without catapult systems.

specialAbilities.name: NATO Flagship
specialAbilities.description: Advanced C4I systems allow the carrier to serve as a NATO task group flagship, coordinating allied naval operations.
